title: Frommon (disambiguation)
content:
'''Frommon''' may refer to one of the following:

*The '''[[Frommon system/Legends|Frommon system]]''', a [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] [[Star system/Legends|star system]]
*The '''[[Frommon longhaul all-purpose transport]]''', a model of [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]]

{{Disambig}}
